CREATE TABLE test_truncation (value DOUBLE, decimals INT);
CREATE TABLE test_data (a DOUBLE, b DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (num1 DOUBLE, num2 DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.ms_trunc((SELECT SUM(num1) FROM additional_data), 2) AS sum_truncated, sys.ms_trunc((SELECT AVG(num2) FROM additional_data), 1) AS avg_truncated;
CREATE TABLE combined_data (value1 DOUBLE, value2 DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.ms_trunc((SELECT MAX(value1) FROM combined_data) + (SELECT MIN(value2) FROM combined_data), 3) AS complex_truncation;
SELECT sys.ms_trunc(a * b, 2) FROM test_data CROSS JOIN additional_data AS ad WHERE ad.num1 > 2;
